mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Q.QUESTION_NO AS questionNo , Q.SUBJECT AS subject , Q.KEYWORD AS keyword FROM QUESTION Q WHERE Q.QUESTION_NO != #{currentQuestionNo} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ANSWER A WHERE A.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO ) ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Q.QUESTION_NO AS questionNo , Q.SUBJECT AS subject , Q.KEYWORD AS keyword FROM QUESTION Q WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ANSWER A WHERE A.QUESTION_NO = Q.QUESTION_NO ) ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT A.ANSWER_CONTENT FROM ANSWER A WHERE A.QUESTION_NO = #{questionNo} ORDER BY A.ANSWER_NO ASC
SELECT DISTINCT A.INPUT_ANSWER FROM ATTEMPT A WHERE A.QUESTION_NO = #{questionNo} AND A.IS_CORRECT = 'N' ORDER BY A.INPUT_ANSWER ASC
